American Fiction (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $21,098,470Details
International Box Office $1,927,773
Worldwide Box Office $23,026,243
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $174,009
Total $174,009
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A frustrated novelist-professor writes an outlandish satire of stereotypical “Black” books, only for it to be mistaken for serious literature and published to high sales and critical praise.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$224,469 (1.1% of total gross)
Legs:8.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:91.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:7 opening theaters/1,902 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $22,370,235

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 15th, 2023 (Limited) by Amazon MGM Studios
January 12th, 2024 (Expands Wide) by Amazon MGM Studios
International Releases: February 2nd, 2024 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: February 6th, 2024 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: R for language throughout, some drug use, sexual references and brief violence.
(Rating bulletin 2794 (cert #54452), 8/2/2023)
Running Time: 117 minutes
Award nomination: 2024 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: BAFTA Best Adapted Screenplay Winner, Writers Guild of America Best Adapted Screenplay Winner
Plot point: African Americans, Satire, Writing and Writers
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Orion Pictures, T-Street, MRC, 3 Arts Entertainment, Almost Infinite
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A frustrated novelist-professor writes an outlandish satire of stereotypical “Black” books, only for it to be mistaken for serious literature and published to high sales and critical praise.
